caption: A man with white hair and a white beard, wearing glasses and a traditional off-white Nehru jacket over a matching kurta, stands behind a dark brown wooden podium delivering a speech. The setting is an indoor space featuring a textured, dark green stone wall with a geometric, staggered pattern. To the man's right, a tall, slender gold-colored pillar is accented with small red flowers. Two thin microphones extend from the podium toward him. As the sequence progresses, the man uses hand gestures to emphasize his points; he initially keeps his arms mostly still, then raises his left hand, and later brings both hands together in front of his chest with a clenched fist before moving his right hand again. His facial expression remains focused and serious throughout the sequence as he speaks.
